extensionDescription.message: Detects whether a website uses Utiq, the telco advertising tracker, and warns you.

popupReportPrompt.message:
🔍 This site is not in our list yet.
Help us reference it!

popupReported.message: ✓ Thanks! This site will soon be added to the list.

popupKnown.message: ✓ This site is already being added.

popupReportError.message: Error, please try again in a moment.

popupReportRateLimited.message: Too many reports, try again later.

blockedDesc.message: Navigation blocked. This site uses Utiq, telco-level advertising tracking that identifies you across the web.

popupBlockHint.message: Blocks navigation to sites using Utiq and shows an unblock prompt.
